headline: Danone discloses unsolicited $25.00/sh proposal
summary: Lifeway confirms receipt of Danone's all-cash $25.00 bid. Stock re-rates on takeover optionality.

headline: Board rejects $25 bid as inadequate
summary: Special committee deems $25 undervalues the kefir franchise. Rights-plan groundwork begins.

headline: Poison pill (rights plan) adopted
summary: 15% trigger rights plan to block creeping control while the board reviews alternatives.

headline: Danone raises bid to $27.00/sh
summary: Sweetened all-cash $27 proposal. Stock pushes toward the bid as deal odds rise.

headline: Board rejects $27 bid
summary: Second rejection — board holds out for more or a stand-alone plan. Premium starts to bleed.

headline: Danone withdraws proposal
summary: Danone drops its bid but keeps its ~23% stake and signs a cooperation agreement. Takeover premium evaporates.

headline: Rights plan extended to Oct 29 2026
summary: Board extends the pill another year — entrenchment read; the governance fight intensifies.

headline: FY25 results · 25th straight quarter of YoY growth
summary: Record annual sales; category momentum intact. Tape begins to decouple from the lost bid.

headline: Q1 2026 print · net sales $63.0M (+37%)
summary: Blowout quarter — +37% sales, GM 27.5% (+360bps), 26th straight YoY-growth quarter.
